channel.title: Papers on Baptiste CHATELIER
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Baptiste CHATELIER

item.title: Model-based Implicit Neural Representation for sub-wavelength Radio Localization
item.description: This paper combines a model-based neural architecture that learns the location-to-channel mapping with model-based optimization techniques to perform UE localization through MIMO systems, with sub-wavelegth precision. Preprint.

item.title: Physically Parameterized Differentiable MUSIC for DoA Estimation with Uncalibrated Arrays
item.description: This paper presents a differentiable MUSIC model to perform joint DoA and harwdare impairments mitigation. Accepted to IEEE ICC 2025.

item.title: CSI Compresion using Channel Charting
item.description: This paper presents how channel charting can be used to perform CSI compression in FDD MIMO systems. Published in IEEE ASILOMAR 2024.

item.title: Model-based learning for multi-antenna multi-frequency location-to-channel mapping
item.description: This paper studies the location-to-channel mapping learning in a multi-antenna multi-frequency setting. Published in IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing.

item.title: Semi-Supervised End-to-End Learning for Integrated Sensing and Communications
item.description: This paper present a new neural archicture for single target Integrated Sensing and Communications with limited labeled data. Published in IEEE ICMLCN 2024.

item.title: Model-based learning for location-to-channel mapping
item.description: This paper present a new neural archicture for the location-to-channel mapping learnign problem. Published in IEEE ICASSP 2024.

item.title: Model-based Deep Learning for Beam Prediction based on a Channel Chart
item.description: This paper presents how the use of channel charting and deep learning allows to decrease the complexity of beam allocation in Cell Free Massive MIMO systems. Published in IEEE ASILOMAR 2023.

item.title: Cartographie du canal par réduction de dimension et réseaux triplets
item.description: This paper reviews the use of triplet networks for channel charting. Published in GRETSI 2023.

item.title: Influence of Dataset Parameters on the Performance of Direct UE Positioning via Deep Learning
item.description: This paper reviews the influence of dataset parameter on UE positioning performance with deep learning methods. Published in IEEE EUCNC&6G Summit 2023.

item.title: Efficient Deep Unfolding for SISO-OFDM Channel Estimation
item.description: This paper presents an improved unfolded MP algorithm for SISO-OFDM channel estimation. Published in IEEE ICC 2023.

item.title: On the Impact of Phase Noise on Beamforming Performance for mmWave Massive MIMO Systems
item.description: This paper reviews the impact of phase noise on the array factor. Published in IEEE WCNC 2023.
